providers.name: Gemini (Google) — free tier
providers.estNote: free while AI Studio billing is disabled
providers.rateLimitNotes: Free while billing disabled. Daily quota resets at midnight Pacific.
providers.recommendationNote: Free while AI Studio billing is disabled. 1M-token context window, 1500 requests/day quota, synthesizes Builder output reliably. Catch: enable billing on AI Studio and routing can quietly flip to paid tier on the same model name.

providers.name: Gemini (Google) — paid
providers.rateLimitNotes: Paid-tier limits are very generous; cost discipline matters more than RPM.

providers.name: Grok (xAI)
providers.rateLimitNotes: API availability and quotas vary; check console for current tier.

providers.name: DeepSeek
providers.rateLimitNotes: Cheapest paid option, but consistently the slowest responder in the hive (60–90s/round).
providers.recommendationNote: Cheapest reliable paid Builder — roughly 10x cheaper per token than Claude or ChatGPT. Caveat: consistently the slowest responder in the hive, often 60–90 seconds per round. If you don't mind the wait, it's the best value.

providers.name: Together AI
providers.rateLimitNotes: Open-weight model gateway; generous limits, not yet hive-tested in production.

providers.name: Mistral
providers.rateLimitNotes: Low RPS on paid Tier 1. A parallel 6-bee hive can trigger 429 even with token budget remaining. Contact Mistral support for tier raise.
providers.recommendationNote: Similar territory to ChatGPT — fast, reliable, with a distinct European model lineage that adds genuine diversity to the hive. Watch the low Tier 1 RPM on paid accounts.

providers.name: ChatGPT (OpenAI)
providers.rateLimitNotes: Tiers scale with usage history; $5 credit unlocks most user needs.
providers.recommendationNote: Strong all-rounder — fast, reliable formatting compliance, consistent convergence behavior. A good default for long-form documents where Builder speed matters.

providers.name: Cohere
providers.rateLimitNotes: Generous trial credits; not yet hive-tested in production.

providers.name: Claude (Anthropic)
providers.rateLimitNotes: Tiers progress automatically with paid spend over time.
providers.recommendationNote: Frequently the best at nuanced voice, precise instruction-following, and detailed reasoning on complex documents. For high-stakes documents (RFP responses, executive summaries, board memos), the premium pays off in fewer rounds to converge.

providers.name: Perplexity
providers.rateLimitNotes: $5/month recurring subscription tier (enable auto-pay at signup) covers most usage; $50/month otherwise.
